1

Problem

Healthcare Is Fragmented & Impersonal

  • Patients juggle multiple apps for vitals, bookings, medications and records with no unified view of their health.
  • Doctors lack real-time remote monitoring tools, forcing reactive rather than proactive patient care.
  • IoT health wearables exist in isolation — no platform connects device data to clinical workflows intelligently.
  • Medical education for patients is buried in web searches, not integrated into their health journey.
2

Solution

A Unified Kinetic Health Sanctuary

  • Patient Command Center — One screen for doctors, bookings, medication, vitals and educational content.
  • Live Vitals Monitoring — Real-time heart rate, SpO2, blood pressure and temperature via Bluetooth LE wearable sync.
  • Doctor Clinical Dashboard — Patient population overview, remote monitoring, scheduling and record management.
  • AI Health Insights — Personalized recommendations from longitudinal vitals data and clinical history.
  • Tele-Health via WebRTC — Integrated video consultations that keep care connected beyond the clinic.
3

Result

Healthcare That Breathes With You

  • Patients access every health touchpoint from a single personalized dashboard.
  • Clinicians track patient vitals and history remotely without requiring in-person visits.
  • The SOS emergency system provides instant critical alert capability from the home screen.
  • Bluetooth IoT integration turns commodity wearables into clinical-grade monitoring devices.
Dual-Mode Platform

Built for Both Sides of Care

🩹
For Patients
  • Vitals Command Center with live IoT monitoring
  • Book doctors, pharmacies and hospitals
  • Medication logging and smart reminders
  • AI-powered health insights
  • Tele-health video consultations (WebRTC)
  • Digital medical records and health reports
  • SOS emergency alert system
  • Nutrition and lab scan tools
👨‍⚕️
For Doctors
  • Patient population dashboard and alerts
  • Remote vitals monitoring for high-risk patients
  • Clinical records — Overview, Clinical, Monitoring
  • Schedule and appointment orchestration
  • Direct messaging with patients
  • Learning library and clinical resources
Key Screens

Every Screen, Purposefully Crafted

01
Live Vitals Command Center

Real-time heart rate and SpO2 sync via Bluetooth LE. Blood pressure, temperature and weight tracked with spark charts showing historical trends at a glance.

Flutter Blue PlusBluetooth LESupabase Realtime
02
Intelligent Doctor Discovery

Filter specialists by category — Cardiology, Neurology, Pediatrics and more. Real-time availability status, ratings and one-tap appointment booking.

Smart FilteringLive AvailabilityInstant Booking
03
Patient Clinical Records

Full clinical history in one place — Overview, Clinical, real-time Monitoring and Admin tabs. Temperature and vitals logs with timestamped precision.

Supabase DBClinical HistoryRemote Monitoring
Key Features

The Full Feature Set

📡
IoT Device Sync

Flutter Blue Plus powers Bluetooth LE connectivity to wearables, syncing vitals in real time.

🤖
AI Health Insights

Personalized recommendations generated from longitudinal vitals and clinical history patterns.

🎥
Tele-Health (WebRTC)

Integrated video consultations — real clinical care delivered without leaving the app.

🚪
SOS Emergency System

One-tap emergency alert visible from the home screen — a critical lifeline built in.

📋
Digital Health Records

Secure tabbed clinical records covering overview, clinical notes, monitoring and admin.

📚
Medical Learning Library

Video lessons and educational content integrated directly into the patient experience.
